slides.slide_content:
minslide

minimal html5 slide deck

(navigate with cursor keys)

features

  • single file
  • self-contained
  • doesn't need web access
  • doesn't do stuff you don't need
  • resolution independend (more or less)

does not provide

  • fancy styling
  • too much cross-browser support
  • speaker's notes
  • table of contents
  • print version
  • ...

copyright

  • CC0 (public domain)
  • do with it whatever you want

腹式深呼吸的原理

Source: https://youtu.be/pa2d45Ix7aQ
